page_metadata.biotools__summary: miQC is an adaptive probabilistic framework for quality control of single-cell RNA-sequencing data. It gives flexible, probablistic metrics for quality control of scRNA-seq data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: miQC is an adaptive probabilistic framework for quality control of single-cell RNA-sequencing data. It gives flexible, probablistic metrics for quality control of scRNA-seq data.
